title: React.js for Beginners
shortDescription: Master React hooks, components, and state management from scratch with live hands-on sessions.
longDescription: This comprehensive React.js course takes you from zero to building real-world applications. You'll learn JSX, functional components, React hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext), React Router, and how to integrate APIs. Every session is live and hands-on.

seo.title: Learn React.js Online — Live Classes by Abhilash Tiwari
seo.description: Join live React.js beginner classes. Hands-on projects, 1-on-1 mentoring. Enroll today!

title: JavaScript Mastery
shortDescription: Go from JavaScript basics to advanced concepts like closures, async/await, and ES6+.
longDescription: A deep-dive into JavaScript covering variables, functions, DOM manipulation, ES6+ features, promises, async/await, closures, prototypes, and modern JavaScript patterns. Perfect for beginners who want to become confident JS developers.

seo.title: JavaScript Mastery Course Online — Live Classes India
seo.description: Learn JavaScript from basics to advanced. Live virtual classes with real projects. Enroll now!

title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
shortDescription: Build beautiful, responsive websites from scratch using modern HTML5 and CSS3.
longDescription: Start your web development journey with HTML5 and CSS3. This course covers semantic HTML, CSS layouts (Flexbox & Grid), responsive design, animations, and best practices for modern web design. Build a real portfolio project by the end.

seo.title: HTML & CSS Course for Beginners — Live Online Classes
seo.description: Learn HTML5 and CSS3 from scratch. Build responsive websites with live online classes. Enroll today!

title: Web Development Basics
shortDescription: A complete beginner bootcamp covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and how the web works.
longDescription: The perfect starting point for anyone new to web development. This course covers how the internet works, HTML structure, CSS styling, JavaScript basics, Git version control, and deploying your first website. Live group sessions with real projects.

seo.title: Web Development Basics Course — Online Beginner Bootcamp India
seo.description: Complete web development beginner course. Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git. Live virtual classes. Enroll now!
